title: key's Cobblemon Picks
description: A Cobblemon expansion modpack that focuses on player expression and building!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/as27nDHW/images/b9f24a3cf7b5a72ca7c73d7c366760eb74322955.png)

Me and my friends are going to be playing on a server with Cobblemon, and I wanted to have some additions to it. So that's where my picks for Cobblemon comes in!

This pack focusses on living in a world with cobblemon and has many mods that add features to express yourself and make more diverse builds and things like that. It's intended to be played without vanilla mobs spawning but is not required.

**If you have any issues in an unmodified version of this modpack, please report it on the discord**

Check out what mods are included on the version page! Thank you to all the amazing mod authors who made this pack possible.
